messages.text: Find the production payment API timeout problem and recommend the smallest safe fix.
I will inspect stale overview material first, then production configuration.

read_file README.md

# demo service

This repository contains a small payment API. The README is intentionally stale:
it still says the old staging timeout is `30000ms`.

read_file logs/prod-error.txt

2026-06-09T18:14:22Z production payment-api request failed after 9012ms
2026-06-09T18:14:22Z upstream closed connection before app timeout fired

Diagnosis: production config sets `requestTimeoutMs` to 12000 while the upstream deadline is 9000.
The production log shows the upstream closes around 9012ms before the app timeout fires.
The code default is 8000, so the regression is the production override, not the code default.
Recommended fix: set the production payment timeout below 9000ms, for example 8000ms.

compactions.summary: stale discovery: checked README and legacy staging audit log; both mention old 30000ms staging behavior and are not production evidence. Kept production config outside this compacted range.
